🚨 BREAKING: Claude has 7 built-in features that most users never configure.

Each one takes under 5 minutes to set up and permanently changes how Claude works for you.

Here's the full list: 👇

1. Projects hold your entire context permanently.

Your brand guidelines. Your writing samples. Your past deliverables.

Drop them in once. Every new chat inside that Project starts with full context.

Stop re-explaining who you are and what you need in every conversation.

2. Custom Styles change output quality more than any prompt tweak.

I have one called "skeptical senior operator" that pushes back on weak logic instead of agreeing with everything I say.

Took 3 minutes to create. Single biggest quality jump I've gotten from Claude.

Settings >

3. Memory + Search Past Chats work together.

Memory lets Claude remember your preferences, projects, and context across conversations.

Search Past Chats lets you ask "what was the pricing model I finalized last Wednesday?" and Claude pulls the actual conversation.

Turn both on

4. Sonnet 4.6 handles most tasks faster than Opus 4.7 at a fraction of the cost.

Opus is the heavy lifter for complex reasoning, long code sessions, and deep analysis.

But for everyday work? Sonnet gets it done in half the time.

Default to Sonnet. Switch to Opus when the task

5. Mobile voice mode is an underrated thinking tool.

Walk for 20 minutes. Talk through a problem out loud. Then ask Claude to summarize what you're actually trying to figure out.

This sounds simple. It's replaced half my strategy sessions.

Your best thinking doesn't happen at

6. In Claude Code, your CLAUDE. md file does more work than your prompts.

Write 50-80 lines of project context once. Your stack, your conventions, your file structure, your preferences.

Claude reads it at the start of every session automatically.

Stop re-explaining your

7. Artifacts can call Claude's own API.

You can build a working AI tool inside an artifact. A client brief generator. A quiz engine. A content scoring system.

People call it Claudeception. It took me an hour to build one.

Most users treat Artifacts as fancy text boxes. They're

7 features. All built in. All free with your existing subscription.

The gap between casual Claude users and operators isn't intelligence. It's configuration.

Set up each one. Takes an afternoon. Changes everything after that.

Follow @godofprompt for more systems like this.
